summary: Started decompilation of the lbarchive library by matching several functions, adding source WIP for additional near-matches, improving prototypes and pointer types around lbfile/HSD_DevComRequest, and promoting two lbarchive address-named symbols to descriptive names used across assembly and C callsites.
what_changed: Added C implementations in src/melee/lb/lbarchive.c for lbArchive_LoadSections, lbArchive_LoadArchive, lbArchive_80016C64, lbArchive_80016DBC, and lbArchive_80016EFC, while keeping lbArchive_InitializeDAT in source.
Renamed lbArchive_80016AF0 to lbArchive_LoadSections and lbArchive_80016BE0 to lbArchive_LoadArchive in config/GALE01/symbols.txt and many assembly callsites under gm, if, mn, un, and sysdolphin.

Updated asm/melee/lb/lbarchive.s with .fn/.endfn labels for lbArchive_InitializeDAT, lbArchive_LoadSections, and lbArchive_LoadArchive, plus regenerated formatting such as hex immediates and clrrwi instead of rlwinm in the aligned-size calculation.
Removed src/melee/lb/lbarchive.c.o from obj_files.mk, leaving the source as WIP while asm/melee/lb/lbarchive.s.o remained linked.
Changed lbarchive.h prototypes to use HSD_Archive*, void**, and varargs signatures for archive section-loading functions.

Adjusted lbfile.c and lbfile.h datatypes around file reads: HSD_DevComRequest arguments were renamed and typed as file/src/dest/size/type/pri/callback/args instead of generic ints or HSD_Archive* pointers.
Updated src/sysdolphin/baselib/devcom.h so HSD_DevComRequest takes unsigned long src, dest, and size plus a void* callback argument payload.
Added casts to void** at affected callsites such as mnDeflicker_8024A6C4, grDatFiles_801C6038, Player_80036DD8, and Fighter_LoadCommonData to match the revised lbArchive prototypes.
Changed lbHeap_80015BD0's return type from HSD_Archive* to void* and added a prototype for lbHeap_80015CA8.
Changed lbDvd_8001819C's declared return type from HSD_Archive* to void*, consistent with the lbfile refactor.
smart_moves: Named functions by behavior once call patterns were clear: lbArchive_LoadArchive loads a DAT file into heap memory, initializes an HSD_Archive, and returns it; lbArchive_LoadSections walks varargs pairs of output pointer and public symbol name.
Used HSD_DevComRequest's proper prototype to drive a broader type cleanup in lbfile rather than preserving misleading HSD_Archive* types for raw memory addresses.
Matched varargs handling explicitly with va_start, va_arg, and a NULL sentinel, mirroring assembly patterns where section output pointers and symbol strings alternate.
Preserved WIP source while continuing to link assembly for lbarchive, allowing documentation and iterative decomp progress without forcing incomplete functions into the build.
Replaced hard-coded extern string labels in lbArchive_InitializeDAT with literal OSReport text and HSD_ASSERT, improving source readability while preserving assert line numbers where shown.
Applied renamed lbarchive symbols consistently across symbols.txt and many asm callsites, improving searchability for future decomp work.
decomp_lessons: When an API prototype becomes known, revisit callers and adjacent helper functions: a correct HSD_DevComRequest signature revealed that lbfile parameters represented raw source/destination addresses and callback args, not archive objects.

For variadic archive loaders, model the argument stream as repeated output-pointer/symbol-name pairs terminated by NULL; callsites may need explicit void** casts when the destination field has a more specific pointer type.
A source file can be used as a WIP decomp reference even when the corresponding asm object remains linked; this PR explicitly removed lbarchive.c.o from obj_files.mk while preserving source work.
Meaningful names can be introduced before full module completion if there is strong behavioral evidence and all symbol/config/asm references are updated together.
Heap allocation helpers that allocate arbitrary buffers should often return void*, not a domain-specific struct pointer, especially when the same helper is used for DAT bytes and HSD_Archive structs.
Partial matches with register swaps can still be useful if isolated in source and not linked; the PR body explicitly notes near-matches blocked by regswaps.
naming_conventions: Parameter names in lbfile were changed from arg0/arg1/etc. to basename, file, src, dest, size, type, pri, callback, and args where roles were inferred.
The PR retained address-style names for still-unidentified functions such as lbArchive_80016C64, lbArchive_80016DBC, lbArchive_80016EFC, and lbFile_8001668C.
For archive section output arguments, headers standardized on void** even though individual callsites may hold typed pointers.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used .fn/.endfn labels in asm/melee/lb/lbarchive.s for functions that gained known names.
Kept asm/melee/lb/lbarchive.s linked and removed src/melee/lb/lbarchive.c.o from obj_files.mk, indicating source was WIP rather than fully link-ready.
Regenerated assembly formatting normalized immediates to forms like 0x0 and changed equivalent instruction aliases such as rlwinm to clrrwi.
Used #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop around lbArchive_InitializeDAT, suggesting inlining control was needed for matching.
Used va_list reconstruction for lbArchive_LoadSections and related helpers to match the assembly's __va_arg loop.
The PR author noted partial matches were close but still suffered register swaps, so some functions were intentionally not forced into the linked build.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: Do not bother removing symbols from asm/**/*.s anymore; use src/**/*.c as a WIP file until it can be fully linked.
review_feedback.impact: Future lbarchive-like work should avoid noisy asm symbol removal when source is not yet linked.

review_feedback.author: ribbanya
review_feedback.feedback: Use tools/revert_asm.py src/.../file.c to regenerate asm when splits change.
review_feedback.impact: Provides a workflow for keeping asm synchronized with source/split changes during WIP decomp.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that fully link src/melee/lb/lbarchive.c.o or remove asm/melee/lb/lbarchive.s.o.
Search for subsequent renames of lbArchive_80016C64, lbArchive_80016DBC, and lbArchive_80016EFC.
Look for follow-up fixes to void** casts at archive section-loading callsites.
Search later changes to HSD_DevComRequest and lbfile prototypes for further type corrections.
Find uses of tools/revert_asm.py in review guidance or decomp workflow updates.
